pi_items.source: Wikipedia search results confirming Spanish Wikipedia article exists at this URL
Linux file system path format standard, verified in export_result.sh script
ISO 639-1 language code standard confirmed via web search
Chromium source code references and usage in setup_task.sh (line 45-47) and export_result.sh (line 49-53) confirming this is the correct preference key for Edge translation settings
Wikipedia article size guidelines which cite 30-50KB as standard threshold for readable prose; verified in verifier.py line 33 and 61

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Microsoft Edge to automatically translate Spanish pages to English, then navigates to the real Spanish Wikipedia article 'Transporte en España' (https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Transporte_en_Espa%C3%B1a) and saves it as PDF to /home/ga/Desktop/spain_transport_report.pdf. Spanish language code is 'es'. Edge stores auto-translation preferences under 'translate_whitelists' in its Preferences JSON file with structure {'es': 'en'}. The minimum PDF file size is 50KB, a standard threshold for Wikipedia article content.
